title: epidendrum johnstonii
intro: Epidendrum johnstonii, also known as the Johnston's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum johnstonii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
